title: 时尚男女田间采收土豆的高定大片
author: A

title: 雪中红酒自拍写真
author: Anissa
prompt:
创作一张超现实的电影剧照风格照片，严格基于所提供的参考照片中的面部，100% 保留面部特征，面部结构和发型绝无任何改变。

图像以低角度自拍形式拍摄，相机略微向上倾斜，营造出动态视角，突显背景中木制山区小屋的宏伟，屋顶被厚厚的积雪覆盖。建筑物的上部线条向远处延伸，增强了戏剧性的低角度构图。

女人被框定在一个特写镜头中。她的脸部略微向前倾斜，朝向相机，使她的面部特征显得更加富有表现力：丰满的嘴唇，清晰的下颌线，以及匀称的比例。她的表情平静而自信，带着一丝柔和、性感的半笑。

她穿着一件蓬松、自然的毛皮大衣，由于拍摄角度，这件大衣占据了画面的下半部分。她的手——由于自拍视角比平时抬得稍高——拿着一个大杯红酒靠近相机，营造出几乎三维的效果。红酒呈现深宝石红色，带有电影般的柔和感，她的手指上戴着金戒指。

她的直发上轻轻地沾染着雪花。她的头顶上方，天空和小屋的屋顶清晰可见，两者都被厚厚的积雪覆盖。大片雪花在空中缓慢飘落，出现在前景和背景中，增加了画面的深度和氛围。

电影感特征：
柔和的胶片颗粒；
柔和、略显低饱和度的调色板；
玻璃和头发上的柔和高光；
温暖的肤色与雪和天空的冷蓝色调形成对比；
角落周围的微妙暗角；
35 毫米胶片效果：平滑的光线过渡，自然的阴影，无数字锐化；
细微的灰尘和微小的胶片瑕疵（可选）。

整体氛围是唯美、奢华、放松和冬日感的，唤起一种置身电影瞬间和真实临场感的感觉。

title: 暗巷光影中的硬汉肖像，皮革夹克，电影感氛围
author: Hatman 🎩
prompt: 创作一张 4:5 比例的风格化中景照片，一名男子站在昏暗的地下走廊中。金属墙壁上的垂直缝隙投射出锐利的白色光束，穿透漂浮的灰尘，部分勾勒出他的轮廓。面部请使用上传的参考图片，不要改变任何面部特征或身份。他身穿一件深石墨色飞行员夹克，带有微妙的金属质感。高对比度照明，深邃的阴影，电影般的未来感张力，忧郁的氛围，真实的材质和皮肤纹理。
prompt_en: Create a 4:5 stylized mid-shot of a man standing in a dim underground corridor. Vertical gaps in a metal wall cast sharp beams of white light through drifting dust, partially carving his silhouette. Use the uploaded reference image for the face and do not change any facial features or identity. He wears a dark graphite bomber jacket with subtle metallic texture. High contrast lighting, deep shadows, cinematic and futuristic tension, moody atmosphere, realistic materials and skin texture.

title: 都市时尚街拍女模
author: miilesus
prompt: 苗条时尚的女人与移动的人群一起创造运动模糊效果，穿着超大的中性色调纹理上衣，具有极简主义的时尚美学，自然的妆容，凌乱的发束勾勒出面部，在背景运动时对模特进行电影般的清晰聚焦，用35mm镜头拍摄全身，f/2.8，快门速度1/30用于运动效果，自然柔和的阴天漫射照明，柔和的中性色调的色彩分级，提升的黑色，柔和的电影哑光饰面，轻微的胶片颗粒用于奢华的编辑外观，超精细的面料，逼真的皮肤纹理，高级时尚街头风格的照片，8k分辨率模特走在人行横道上，上衣自然摆动，手臂松散摆动，与相机直接眼神接触，优雅动态的姿势，周围有运动模糊
prompt_en:
Prompt for Gemini nano banana 🍌 @eachlabs
Street photography series - 2
slim stylish woman in a busy city street with moving crowd creating motion blur effect, wearing an oversized neutral-toned textured blazer with minimalist fashion aesthetic, natural makeup, messy hair strands framing face, cinematic sharp focus on model while background is in motion, full body shot captured with 35mm lens, f/2.8, shutter speed 1/30 for motion effect, natural soft overcast daylight with diffused lighting, color grading with muted neutral tones, lifted blacks, soft cinematic matte finish, slight film grain for luxury editorial look, ultra-detailed fabrics, realistic skin texture, high-fashion street style photograph, 8k resolution
model mid-step on a crosswalk, blazer swaying naturally, arms swinging loosely, direct eye contact with camera, elegant and dynamic posture with motion blur all around

author: K

title: 一幅极其细腻的日式水彩插画
author: @servasyy_ai
prompt:
完美的构图，最高品质，8K分辨率，柔和的氛围，专业水准，屡获殊荣的风格，细腻的艺术性。

创作一幅极其细腻的日式水彩插画（透明水彩），描绘一位温柔梦幻的中国偶像少女。作品特色包括：柔和透明的色彩晕染，可见水彩晕染的痕迹；细腻的色彩晕染和渐变（湿画法）；柔和的粉彩色调（柔和的粉色、薄荷绿、薰衣草紫、蜜桃色）；轻盈通透的画面，露出大量白纸；微妙的色彩层次营造出光泽感十足的肤色；以及流畅飘逸的发丝，笔触自由奔放。

这幅画作绘制于高品质冷压水彩纸（300克/平方米，纹理清晰可见）上，保留了纸张的自然起皱，展现了水彩颜料的典型特征，包括晕染、花椰菜状纹理和颗粒感。画面周围点缀着精致的花卉元素（樱花、绣球花），以透明水彩晕染技法绘制而成。

右上角用柔和的灰色水彩笔触，以细腻的书法写着日期“2026.01.04”。这幅水彩画置于洁净的白色桌面上，旁边摆放着水彩工具（调色盘、画笔、水杯）。iPhone屏幕上显示着一张参考照片，照片反射着柔和的自然光。画中人物的面部特征与照片完全一致——同样的柔和表情，同样的比例，以柔和的水彩风格呈现。

柔和的粉彩色调：腮红粉、天蓝、薄荷绿、薰衣草紫、蜜桃色、暖米色，搭配大量白色纸张。营造出浪漫、温柔、清新的氛围，并融入了日式美学理念（侘寂、留白）。无艺术家签名。3:4 竖幅构图。
prompt_en:
Perfect composition, highest quality, 8K resolution, soft atmosphere, professional level, award-winning style, delicate artistry.

Create an extremely detailed Japanese watercolor illustration (透明水彩) depicting a Chinese idol girl with gentle, dreamy aesthetic. The artwork features: soft transparent color washes with visible water blooms, delicate color bleeding and gradients (wet-on-wet technique), pastel color palette (soft pinks, mint greens, lavender, peachy tones), light and airy feeling with plenty of white paper showing through, subtle color layering creating luminous skin tones, loose expressive brushwork in hair with flowing strands.

The painting is rendered on high-quality cold-pressed watercolor paper (300gsm texture visible), with natural paper buckling, authentic watercolor medium characteristics including backruns, cauliflower effects, and granulation. Delicate floral elements scattered around (cherry blossoms, hydrangeas) painted in transparent washes.

In the top right corner, the date "2026.01.04" is written in soft gray watercolor with delicate brush calligraphy. The watercolor painting is placed on a clean white surface with watercolor supplies nearby (paint palette with mixed colors, brushes, water cup). An iPhone displays the reference photograph with soft natural reflections. The facial features are perfectly identical to the photo - same gentle expression, same proportions, rendered in soft watercolor style.

Soft pastel color palette: blush pink, sky blue, mint green, lavender, peach, warm beige, with lots of white paper. Romantic, gentle, fresh atmosphere with Japanese aesthetic sensibility (wabi-sabi, ma - negative space). No artist signature. 3:4 portrait orientation.

title: 圣诞帽风格化头像生成
author: katon
prompt:
以用户上传的参考图片为基础，为主体添加一顶经典的圣诞老人帽。

风格匹配：精确保留原始艺术风格（2D/3D/写实/动漫/卡通），保持身份、面部特征、发型、颜色、阴影和整体构图不变。

帽子设计：传统的圣诞老人帽（红色毛毡，带有细微的织物质感，白色蓬松边饰，白色绒球）。自然地放置在头部上方，与头部角度和发际线对齐。尊重透视、比例和头部形状。

整合：匹配现有的光照、阴影、高光、线条和渲染风格。在帽子接触头发/前额的地方添加逼真的接触阴影。不要改变面部、头发、背景、服装或任何其他元素。

输出：方形（1:1）头像，在小尺寸的个人资料图片下清晰锐利。
prompt_en:
Using the user-uploaded reference image as the base, add a classic Christmas Santa hat to the subject.

Style match: preserve the original art style exactly (2D/3D/photorealistic/anime/cartoon), keeping identity, facial features, hairstyle, colors, shading, and overall composition unchanged.

Hat design: traditional Santa hat (red felt with subtle fabric texture, white fluffy trim, white pom-pom). Place it naturally on top of the head, aligned to head angle and hairline. Respect perspective, scale, and head shape.

Integration: match the existing lighting, shadows, highlights, linework, and rendering style. Add realistic contact shadows where the hat touches hair/forehead. Do not alter the face, hair, background, clothing, or any other elements.

Output: square (1:1) avatar, crisp and clear at small profile-picture size.

title: 地下停车场超模街拍
author: @TheLOKII_
prompt:
超写实奢华时尚大片，安娜·德·阿玛斯迈步走向镜头，手臂自然摆动，眼神专注，狗仔抓拍感。

场景：地下停车场，灯带纵深，长景深。

服装：奶油色短款上衣，深色牛仔牛仔裤，黑色细高跟。

配饰：小型绗缝手提包，极简珠宝。

氛围：真实，强大，明星气场。

风格：街头时尚+《Vogue》混合。

图像质量：8K，平衡锐度，微妙胶片颗粒。

灯光：环境光+柔和主光。

色彩分级：中性电影色调。

相机：单反，85mm，f1.8。

参数：9:16，步数50，CFG 8.0。
负面：摆拍姿势，人工辉光。
prompt_en:
Ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial featuring Ana de Armas walking toward camera mid-step, natural arm swing, focused eyes, candid paparazzi energy.

Scene: underground parking garage, strip lighting, long depth.

Outfit: cream cropped blouse, dark denim jeans, black stilettos.

Accessories: small quilted handbag, minimal jewelry.

Mood: real, powerful, celebrity presence.

Style: street fashion + Vogue hybrid.

Image Quality: 8K, balanced sharpness, subtle film grain.

Lighting: ambient + soft key light.

Color Grading: neutral cinematic palette.

Camera: DSLR, 85mm, f1.8.

Parameters: 9:16, steps 50, CFG 8.0.
Negative: staged pose, artificial glow.

title: 纹身少女冰箱前喷奶油的写实生活肖像
author: Natty Windstorm
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "一位纹身年轻女性的写实生活肖像，夜晚站在敞开的冰箱前。她身穿白色背心和白色短裤，手持一罐生奶油并将其喷入口中。金色齐肩发，自然妆容，自信放松的姿态。手臂、颈部和大腿上有精致的黑灰色纹身。冰箱内部灯光明亮，里面摆满了罐子、泡菜、水果和一个菠萝。电影般的灯光，凉爽的冰箱灯光与较暗的厨房背景形成对比。浅景深，高细节，逼真的皮肤纹理，现代编辑摄影风格。",
  "negative_prompt": "模糊，低分辨率，卡通，插画，绘画，过曝，欠曝，解剖结构扭曲，多余肢体，糟糕的手部，不真实的比例，水印，文字，标志",
  "style": "photorealistic",
  "lighting": "电影感，凉爽的室内照明",
  "camera": {
    "lens": "50mm",
    "aperture": "f/1.8",
    "depth_of_field": "浅景深"
  },
  "quality": "高细节，超现实",
  "aspect_ratio": "2:3"
}
```

title: 红裙女子美术馆内沉思，金表点缀优雅姿态
author: Lex

title: 优雅女性镜前自拍，举杯笑颜，复古餐厅烛光氛围
author: Nano banana pro🍌

title: 高定时尚写真：金发女郎沙发姿态
author: Ankit Mishra

title: labubu风格动态
author: @berryxia_ai
prompt:
# System Prompt: 
Pop Mart "The Monsters" x Real Human Fashion Editorial Generator

**Role:** Senior Art Director & IP Collaboration Specialist.
**Expertise:** Photorealistic Character Fusion, Commercial Fashion Layout, and "Digital Twin" Identity Preservation.

**CORE DIRECTIVE:**
Generate a high-end fashion magazine spread merging a **Real Human User** (with strict identity preservation) and a **Pop Mart IP Character** (The Monsters Family). They must be styled as "Fashion Partners" with active interaction.

## 1. The "Twin-Subject" Composition

### A. The Anchor: Real Human (Strict Constraint)
* **Identity Lock:** You MUST strictly adhere to the facial features, hair color/style, and body proportions of the uploaded user reference image. Do not alter the user's identity.
* **Outfit Replication:** Precisely replicate the clothing items from the reference (e.g., Khaki jacket, plaid lining, lace tunic, split-pattern tie, newsboy cap).
* **Expression:** Natural, confident, suitable for a street snap.

### B. The Companion: Pop Mart IP Character (Dynamic Selection)
* **Character Logic:** Select a character from "The Monsters" family that best fits the outfit's vibe:
    * *Labubu:* For playful, mischievous, or casual styles.
    * *Zimomo:* For cooler, edgier, or more "boss-like" outfits (distinctive tail and ears).
    * *Tycoco:* For quirky, avant-garde, or skeletal/structure-heavy looks.
* **"Miniature Couture" Styling:** The chosen character must wear a **custom-tailored miniature version** of the user's outfit. The clothes should fit their unique body shape (e.g., cap sits around Labubu's ears; tie fits Zimomo's shorter neck).
* **Material Reality:** Render the character with hyper-realistic textures (e.g., plush fur for Labubu/Zimomo, matte vinyl for others) contrasting with the realistic fabric of the clothes.

### C. Interaction Dynamics (Crucial)
* **Active Engagement:** The Human and the Character must interact, not just pose side-by-side.
    * *Examples:* High-fiving, the character sitting on the user's shoulder, the user fixing the character's tie, holding hands walking, or looking at a phone together.
* **Scale:** The character should be approximately knee-height (walking) or shoulder-sized (carrying), consistent with "life-sized toy" physics.

## 2. Visual Aesthetics & Layout

### A. Background & Atmosphere
* **Setting:** Realistic urban street photography context (blurred for depth).
* **Lighting:** Coherent lighting source (Sunlight/Streetlight) hitting both the Human and the Character from the same angle to ensure they look like they inhabit the same physical space.

### B. Artistic Layout (Magazine Style)
* **Dynamic Boundaries:** Use artistic dividers (Brush strokes, paper tears, fluid geometric shapes) to separate the "Lifestyle Image" (Left, ~60%) from the "Utility Sidebar" (Right, ~40%).
* **Typography:** Include a catchy, stylish headline overlay (e.g., "MONSTER STYLE", "CITY TWINS", "ZIMOMO x [User Name]").

## 3. Sidebar Utility & Data

### A. Mood & Occasion Tags
* **Function:** Provide context for the outfit.
* **Format:** Stylish tags or floating text.
    * *Example:* "Situation: Coffee Run", "Mood: Cheeky", "Vibe: Retro Workwear".

### B. Smart Color Analysis (色卡)
* **Visual:** A dedicated section showing the **Color Palette** of the outfit.
* **Format:** A strip of 5 circles/squares extracting the dominant colors (e.g., Khaki, Burgundy, Forest Green, Cream, Brown) with Hex codes or Pantones.

### C. Item Breakdown (Classic)
* **List:** The 5 key items (Cap, Jacket, Top, Tie, Boots).
* **Style:** Isolated "Ghost Mannequin" cutouts.
* **Text:** Bold "**OOTD STYLE**" header, Chinese item name, and Price (¥).

## 4. Execution Process
1.  **Analyze Input:** Identify user face + Outfit details.
2.  **Select IP:** Choose Labubu, Zimomo, or other based on "Vibe Check".
3.  **Render Fusion:** Generate the interactive scene with matching lighting.
4.  **Compose Layout:** Apply the artistic boundary and overlay typography.
5.  **Final Output:** A seamless integration of Reality and Pop Art.
prompt_en:
# System Prompt: 
Pop Mart "The Monsters" x Real Human Fashion Editorial Generator

**Role:** Senior Art Director & IP Collaboration Specialist.
**Expertise:** Photorealistic Character Fusion, Commercial Fashion Layout, and "Digital Twin" Identity Preservation.

**CORE DIRECTIVE:**
Generate a high-end fashion magazine spread merging a **Real Human User** (with strict identity preservation) and a **Pop Mart IP Character** (The Monsters Family). They must be styled as "Fashion Partners" with active interaction.

## 1. The "Twin-Subject" Composition

### A. The Anchor: Real Human (Strict Constraint)
* **Identity Lock:** You MUST strictly adhere to the facial features, hair color/style, and body proportions of the uploaded user reference image. Do not alter the user's identity.
* **Outfit Replication:** Precisely replicate the clothing items from the reference (e.g., Khaki jacket, plaid lining, lace tunic, split-pattern tie, newsboy cap).
* **Expression:** Natural, confident, suitable for a street snap.

### B. The Companion: Pop Mart IP Character (Dynamic Selection)
* **Character Logic:** Select a character from "The Monsters" family that best fits the outfit's vibe:
    * *Labubu:* For playful, mischievous, or casual styles.
    * *Zimomo:* For cooler, edgier, or more "boss-like" outfits (distinctive tail and ears).
    * *Tycoco:* For quirky, avant-garde, or skeletal/structure-heavy looks.
* **"Miniature Couture" Styling:** The chosen character must wear a **custom-tailored miniature version** of the user's outfit. The clothes should fit their unique body shape (e.g., cap sits around Labubu's ears; tie fits Zimomo's shorter neck).
* **Material Reality:** Render the character with hyper-realistic textures (e.g., plush fur for Labubu/Zimomo, matte vinyl for others) contrasting with the realistic fabric of the clothes.

### C. Interaction Dynamics (Crucial)
* **Active Engagement:** The Human and the Character must interact, not just pose side-by-side.
    * *Examples:* High-fiving, the character sitting on the user's shoulder, the user fixing the character's tie, holding hands walking, or looking at a phone together.
* **Scale:** The character should be approximately knee-height (walking) or shoulder-sized (carrying), consistent with "life-sized toy" physics.

## 2. Visual Aesthetics & Layout

### A. Background & Atmosphere
* **Setting:** Realistic urban street photography context (blurred for depth).
* **Lighting:** Coherent lighting source (Sunlight/Streetlight) hitting both the Human and the Character from the same angle to ensure they look like they inhabit the same physical space.

### B. Artistic Layout (Magazine Style)
* **Dynamic Boundaries:** Use artistic dividers (Brush strokes, paper tears, fluid geometric shapes) to separate the "Lifestyle Image" (Left, ~60%) from the "Utility Sidebar" (Right, ~40%).
* **Typography:** Include a catchy, stylish headline overlay (e.g., "MONSTER STYLE", "CITY TWINS", "ZIMOMO x [User Name]").

## 3. Sidebar Utility & Data

### A. Mood & Occasion Tags
* **Function:** Provide context for the outfit.
* **Format:** Stylish tags or floating text.
    * *Example:* "Situation: Coffee Run", "Mood: Cheeky", "Vibe: Retro Workwear".

### B. Smart Color Analysis (色卡)
* **Visual:** A dedicated section showing the **Color Palette** of the outfit.
* **Format:** A strip of 5 circles/squares extracting the dominant colors (e.g., Khaki, Burgundy, Forest Green, Cream, Brown) with Hex codes or Pantones.

### C. Item Breakdown (Classic)
* **List:** The 5 key items (Cap, Jacket, Top, Tie, Boots).
* **Style:** Isolated "Ghost Mannequin" cutouts.
* **Text:** Bold "**OOTD STYLE**" header, Chinese item name, and Price (¥).

## 4. Execution Process
1.  **Analyze Input:** Identify user face + Outfit details.
2.  **Select IP:** Choose Labubu, Zimomo, or other based on "Vibe Check".
3.  **Render Fusion:** Generate the interactive scene with matching lighting.
4.  **Compose Layout:** Apply the artistic boundary and overlay typography.
5.  **Final Output:** A seamless integration of Reality and Pop Art.

title: 儿童绘本风格手绘插画设计提示词
author: Adam也叫吉米

title: 红发少女自拍写真指南
author: Lex

title: 潮流少女自拍写真风
author: 骑司Chase
prompt:
**一、构图与视角**  
1. **构图方式**：采用近距离半身自拍的构图方式，画面以脸部为中心，手臂伸向镜头，营造出透视感。  
2. **视角特点**：采用略微俯拍的角度，头部略微倾斜，脸部在画面中占据较大比例；背景部分模糊，减弱了背景的视觉存在感。  
3. **相机设置**：使用闪光灯，照亮脸部以及黑色帽檐上的闪钻；帽檐有强烈的反光效果。脸部在闪光灯的照射下显得比身体其他部位的肤色更加白皙。  

**二、人物特征**
prompt_en:
✨“你也知道我是个Super Star吧”
调试了两个小时提示词，效果总算满意了，使用模型：Nano Banana Pro
✍️中文提示词：
一、构图与视角
1 构图方式：近距离半身自拍构图，画面以脸部为中心，手臂伸向镜头形成透视感
2 视角特点：略带俯拍角度，头部倾斜，占画面比例极大，背景虚化弱存在感
3 相机：闪光灯，照亮面部和黑色帽檐上的闪钻。帽檐有强烈的反光。面部被闪光灯照亮，显得比身体肤色更亮白。
二、人物特征
1 五官风格：亚洲少女，睫毛清晰，鼻梁顺滑，嘴唇饱满微张，整体偏精致少女感。
2 发型特征：长发顺滑发量如丝绸，发量饱满，大波浪卷度，头发颜色偏浅暖色
三、妆容与皮肤质感
1 妆容风格：自然感，眼妆强调眼线与睫毛，唇妆偏水润光泽，腮部与鼻梁有高光，眼下泪痣，抖音风格，偏日韩
2 皮肤质感：肤色略带淡粉、皮肤细腻、有轻微磨皮与柔焦感、几乎无明显瑕疵
四、服饰与配饰
1 头部配饰：棒球帽造型，帽檐带高反光装饰元素，帽身带有高反光元素组成的潮流图案。整体偏街头潮流感
2 颈部配饰：细款皮质颈圈式项链，金属质感明显，挂坠造型简单酷感
3 服装风格：上衣为贴身抹胸款式，颜色偏浅暖，胸前图案简单，整体偏时尚街拍风
五、光线与色调
1 光线特点：面部高光明显
2 色彩倾向：肤色偏奶油感，背景压暗以突出人物
六、质感与后期风格
1 画面质感：细节锐利，边缘干净
2 风格定位：偏时尚美女自拍风，结合潮流街头元素与精修质感

title: 阳光下的静谧校园肖像
author: MANISH1027512
prompt: 一个坐在阳光明媚的教室里的年轻女子的柔和的电影肖像。她双手托着下巴，平静而平静地凝视着镜头。自然阳光穿过精致的蕾丝窗帘，在她的脸和桌子上投下柔和的图案阴影。她那深色的长发略显凌乱，在背光的照射下显得有些松散。她穿着一件白色衬衫，袖子鼓鼓的，穿着格子裙，打扮成复古的女学生风格。她旁边的木制课桌上放着一小堆五颜六色的杂志。整体氛围柔和通风，色调柔和，亮点柔和，质感逼真。景深浅，窗户光线温暖，灰尘颗粒隐约可见，8K高细节人像。
prompt_en:
A soft, cinematic portrait of a young woman sitting in a sunlit classroom.
She rests her chin on her hands and gazes directly at the camera with a calm, quietly emotional expression.
Natural sunlight streams through delicate lace curtains, casting soft patterned shadows across her face and the desk.
Her long dark hair is slightly messy, with loose strands illuminated by the backlight.
She wears a white blouse with puffed sleeves and a plaid skirt, styled in a vintage schoolgirl fashion.
A small stack of colorful magazines sits on the wooden classroom desk beside her.
The overall atmosphere is gentle and airy, with muted tones, soft highlights, and realistic texture.
Shallow depth of field, warm window light, dust particles faintly visible, 8K high-detail portrait.

title: 海边日落下的温柔少女写真
author: Zara
prompt:
使用与参考图像完全相同的面部（100% 相同，面部无任何变化）来创建图像。
一位美丽可爱的年轻女性的特写侧面照，她略微侧身站立，轻轻地将脸转向镜头，带着一丝柔和、微妙的微笑。
妆容：
自然妆容，肌肤呈现水润光泽感。强调健康、明亮的肌肤质感。脸颊和鼻尖轻扫柔和的淡粉色腮红。唇部是水润的渐变粉色，呈现饱满多汁的视觉效果。整体妆容清新、自然、容光焕发（水光肌）。
肤色：
非常白皙、明亮、光滑、无瑕的肌肤。
发型：
棕色长发在脑后松散地扎成低马尾。强劲的海风吹拂着头发，使其自由凌乱地飘动。几缕发丝拂过她的脸庞和眼睛，营造出自然的动感和随性、电影般的氛围。
服装：
穿着一件柔软蓬松的 {"sweater color" "米色"} 针织毛衣，宽大的领口巧妙地露出锁骨和上胸部区域。面料看起来温暖、舒适且富有质感。
场景与氛围：
背景设定在日落时分（黄金时段）的海边。广阔的海洋延伸至远方。地平线与天空相接，天空中弥漫着柔和的橙色和粉色调，逐渐过渡到淡紫色。
太阳呈现为一个微小的发光圆圈，即将从左侧地平线落下。一艘小船在远处漂浮。
光线：
温暖的金色阳光在她头发周围形成精致的金色轮廓光，突出每一缕发丝。柔和、自然的光线，伴有轻柔的阴影。
情绪与风格：
浪漫、宁静、略带孤独、忧郁而美丽。梦幻、电影感、情感丰富、诗意的氛围。浅景深、柔和的背景虚化、高写实度、超细节、自然摄影风格。
prompt_en:
Create an image using the exact same face as the reference image (100% identical, no facial changes at all).
A close-up profile shot of a beautiful, cute young woman, standing slightly sideways and gently turning her face toward the camera with a soft, subtle smile.
Makeup:
Natural makeup with a dewy, glowing skin finish. Emphasis on healthy, luminous skin texture. Soft light pink blush applied on the cheeks and lightly across the tip of the nose. Glossy gradient pink lips, giving a juicy, hydrated look. Overall fresh, natural, and radiant (Dewy look).
Skin:
Very fair, bright, smooth, and flawless skin.
Hair:
Long brown hair loosely tied in a low ponytail at the back. Strong seaside wind causes the hair to flow freely and messily. Several loose strands blow across her face and eyes, creating natural movement and an effortless, cinematic feel.
Clothing:
Wearing a soft, fluffy {"sweater color" "cream-beige"} knit sweater with a wide neckline that subtly reveals the collarbones and upper chest area. Fabric looks warm, cozy, and textured.
Scene & Atmosphere:
Set by the seaside during sunset (Golden Hour). A vast ocean stretches into the background. The horizon meets a sky filled with soft orange and pink tones fading into light purple hues.
The sun appears as a small glowing circle, about to dip below the horizon on the left side. A small boat floats far away in the distance.
Lighting:
Warm golden sunlight creates a delicate golden rim light around her hair, highlighting individual strands. Soft, natural light with gentle shadows.
Mood & Style:
Romantic, quiet, slightly lonely, melancholic yet beautiful. Dreamy, cinematic, emotional, and poetic atmosphere. Shallow depth of field, soft background blur, high realism, ultra-detailed, natural photography style.

title: 都市夜景时尚人像摄影指南
author: Qaiser Tzq

title: 卧室自拍少女穿搭预设
author: Just_sharon7
prompt: 一位20出头的西欧裔年轻女子坐在床上，手持iPhone自拍character_details她有一头淡棕色或金色的头发向后梳，白皙健康的肤色，有着微妙的光泽和自然的光泽，开玩笑地看着镜头，表情柔和而愉快。戴着小耳环和银项链。衣服顶部合身的短袖连肩t恤，白色上衣，深灰色袖子，红色和蓝色复古图案文字“Radium”底部浅橄榄绿或卡其色工装裤}},环境设置室内、卧室环境背景舒适整洁的卧室，柔软的米色墙壁，一张整洁的床，铺着中性色的床上用品，一张小床头柜，右边有一盏灯，左边有一扇带光幕
prompt_en:
Google Gemini Nano Banana pro 3.0 and Grok Imagine.

{
image_prompt
subject
character
A young woman of Western/European descent, appearing to be in her early 20s, sitting on a bed, holding an iPhone to take a selfie
character_details
She has light brown or blonde hair pulled back, a fair, healthy complexion with a subtle glow and natural shine, looking playfully at the camera with a soft, cheerful expression. Wearing small earrings and a silver chain necklace.
clothing
top
A fitted, short-sleeved raglan t-shirt with a white body and dark grey sleeves, retro-style graphic text 'Radium' in red and blue
bottom
Light olive green or khaki cargo-style pants
}
},
environment
setting
Indoors, bedroom environment
background
Cozy, tidy bedroom with soft cream-colored walls, a neatly made bed with neutral-colored bedding, a small bedside table with a lamp on the right, and a window with light curtains on the left
details
Natural soft lighting coming from the window enhances skin glow
Background elements are slightly blurred to keep focus on the woman

title: 一张竖版服装海报
author: @aidavid125
prompt:
以上传的照片为唯一人物参考，生成一张竖版服装海报。

【布局硬性规则】
- 必须正好有 6 张卡片，2 行 × 3 列（横向 3 列，纵向 2 行down)
- 第 1 行：造型 1、2、3 | 第 2 行：造型 4、5、6
- 禁止使用：9格网格、3行×2列、2栏布局、额外卡片、顶部标题/标题

【画布与布局】
- 垂直4:5宽高比，背景#F7F5F2
- 网格占据画布高度的 92% ≥ ，底部边距为 3% ≤
  外边距 2%，行距 1.5%，严格对齐

【卡片规格】
- 白色背景#FFFFFF ，圆角 5%，描边 1px #E5E7EB
- 顶部标题栏：高度 12%，背景色#F3F4F6 ，文本颜色 #111827
- 无衬线字体，对齐方式始终一致

【角色一致性】
- 这6个人必须是同一个人，只是穿着不同的衣服：同样的脸，同样的发型，同样的身材比例，同样的举止。
- 禁止：换人/改变容貌/改变性别特征/极端瘦身或拉长腿部

【摄影质量】
- 大师级影棚全身写真集，85mm 人像镜头拍摄效果
- 柔光箱主光 + 轻微补光，自然肌肤纹理，轻微修图
- 纯色无缝背景（白色/浅灰色/米白色），无杂物

【统一裁剪】
- 4:5 全身照，从头到脚完整呈现
- 以受试者为中心，身高 88%±2%
  头部空间2-4%，脚部空间3-5%，鞋子完全可见
- 所有六张照片：相机高度/焦距/光线/姿势均保持一致

【穿搭规则】
- 根据受试者年龄（成人/儿童）自动调整
- 每套造型≤ 3件核心单品，每套服装最多3种颜色，配饰≤ 2件
- 6 看起来截然不同，但风格统一：简约/干净/精致/易于复刻

【标题集】
成人：商务/经典→休闲/周末→商务休闲/晚装→度假/休闲→运动休闲/活力→叠穿/过渡装
儿童：日常/干净→上学/整洁→周末/玩耍→派对/甜美→活力/运动→多层/舒适

消极的：
3x3，九宫格，9张卡片，额外卡片，3行2列，双栏布局，顶部大标题，页面标题，人物切换，换脸，多人，低分辨率，模糊，塑料皮肤，广角畸变，鱼眼，身体扭曲，极度瘦身，长腿效果，户外背景，纹理墙，鞋子被剪掉，半身，成人化，性感，内衣，透视，高跟鞋（儿童），浓妆（儿童），水印，裁剪文字
prompt_en:
Using the uploaded photo as the sole character reference, generate a vertical outfit poster.

【LAYOUT HARD RULES】
- Must have exactly 6 cards only, 2 rows × 3 columns (3 columns across, 2 rows down)
- Row 1: LOOK 1, 2, 3 | Row 2: LOOK 4, 5, 6
- Prohibited: 9-grid, 3 rows × 2 columns, 2-column layout, extra cards, top header/title

【CANVAS & LAYOUT】
- Vertical 4:5 aspect ratio, background #F7F5F2
- Grid occupies ≥92% of canvas height, bottom margin ≤3%
- Outer margin 2%, spacing 1.5%, strictly aligned

【CARD SPECIFICATIONS】
- White background #FFFFFF, border-radius 5%, stroke 1px #E5E7EB
- Top title bar: height 12%, background #F3F4F6, text color #111827
- Sans-serif font, alignment consistent throughout

【CHARACTER CONSISTENCY】
- All 6 must be the same person in different outfits: same face, same hairstyle, same body proportions, same demeanor
- Prohibited: switching people/changing face/altering gender features/extreme slimming or leg lengthening

【PHOTOGRAPHY QUALITY】
- Master-level studio full-body lookbook, 85mm portrait lens look
- Softbox key light + subtle fill, natural skin texture with light retouching
- Solid seamless background (white/light gray/off-white), no clutter

【UNIFORM CROPPING】
- 4:5 full-body, complete from head to shoes
- Subject centered, height 88%±2%
- Headroom 2-4%, footroom 3-5%, shoes fully visible
- All six shots: consistent camera height/focal length/lighting/pose

【OUTFIT RULES】
- Auto-adapt based on subject age (adult/child)
- Each look ≤3 core items, max 3 colors per outfit, accessories ≤2
- 6 looks distinctly different, but unified style: minimal/clean/polished/easy to recreate

【TITLE SETS】
Adult: Business/Classic → Casual/Weekend → Smart Casual/Evening → Resort/Vacation → Athleisure/Active → Layered/Transitional
Kids: Everyday/Clean → School/Polished → Weekend/Play → Party/Sweet → Active/Sporty → Layered/Cozy

NEGATIVE:
3x3, nine-grid, 9 cards, extra cards, 3 rows x 2 columns, two-column layout, big top header, page title, switching people, changing face, multiple people, lowres, blurry, plastic skin, wide-angle distortion, fisheye, warped body, extreme slimming, long legs effect, outdoor background, textured wall, cut off shoes, half body, adultification, sexy, lingerie, see-through, high heels (kids), heavy makeup (kids), watermark, cropped text

title: 湿发女子侧脸特写，水珠滑落，展现纯净护肤瞬间
author: cinema 🎥

title: 街头时尚大片多视角预设
author: Emily

title: 复古公路电影风男性肖像写真
author: Kashberg
prompt:
一幅电影般的、超写实的肖像画，描绘了一位英俊的年轻男子坐在一辆复古银色经典汽车的驾驶座上。他留着造型别致的棕色头发，略带胡茬，戴着黑色徒步旅行者墨镜，身穿深色牛仔夹克。他的手臂随意地搭在敞开的车窗框上。背景是一条笔直的柏油公路，穿过沙漠景观，路边点缀着仙人掌和电线杆。光线温暖，阳光普照，预示着黄金时段，营造出一种怀旧的美国公路旅行美学。8K 分辨率，高度细节，锐利对焦。

"subject": {
  "gender": "男性",
  "age": "青年",
  "hair": "造型别致的棕色头发，飞机头",
  "facial_hair": "胡茬",
  "accessories": "黑色墨镜",
  "clothing": "深色牛仔夹克"
},
"environment": {
  "location": "沙漠公路",
  "elements": [
    "仙人掌",
    "电线杆",
    "柏油路",
    "干枯的灌木丛"
  ],
  "vehicle": "复古经典汽车，镀铬细节，开着的车窗"
},
"technical_details": {
  "lighting": "黄金时段，温暖的自然光",
  "style": "电影感，超写实，生活方式摄影",
  "angle": "平视视角，透过车窗的侧面特写"
}

title: 夏日街头时尚肖像：阳光下的优雅姿态
author: YaseenK7212

title: 高街时尚男性肖像特写
author: Soner 🇹🇷͜͜͡͡✯

title: 一位年轻女性的时尚电影肖像
author: @hellokaton
prompt:
一位年轻女性的时尚、电影肖像，她坐在一张现代椅子上，在室内。她以 3/4 视角构图，身体微微向后倾斜，一只手臂随意地搭在椅子上，散发出平静而自信的氛围。这位女士拥有一张瓜子脸，线条分明的下颌，发型与参考图片完全一致。她穿着一套时尚的全黑服装，包括深色高领毛衣和结构感强的西装外套，展现出高端时尚的编辑造型。
背景是一堵光滑的深色墙壁，窗户投射出引人注目的几何光影图案，散发出柔和的粉紫色光芒，与阴影形成鲜明对比。彩色的光线落在墙壁上，并 subtly 照亮她的头发和肩膀边缘，增强了戏剧性的氛围。整体照明 moody 而艺术，具有柔和的阴影和电影般的对比度。色彩分级强调深黑色、柔和的肤色和鲜艳的粉色高光，营造出杂志封面般的审美效果。
主体略微偏离中心。最终图像中不应出现任何文字、徽标或水印。
prompt_en: A fashionable, cinematic portrait of a young woman sitting on a modern chair indoors. She is composed in a three-quarter view, slightly leaning back with one arm casually resting on the chair, exuding a calm and confident aura. The woman has an oval face with well-defined jawline, and her hairstyle matches exactly the reference image. She is dressed in a stylish all-black outfit, including a dark turtleneck sweater and a structured blazer, showcasing a high-end fashion editorial look. The background features a smooth, dark wall with windows casting striking geometric light and shadow patterns, emitting soft pink-purple glow that contrasts with the shadows. Colored light subtly falls on her hair and shoulder edges, enhancing the dramatic atmosphere. Overall lighting is moody and artistic, with soft shadows and cinematic contrast. Color grading emphasizes deep blacks, soft skin tones, and vibrant pink highlights, creating a magazine cover aesthetic. The subject is slightly off-center. The final image should contain no text, logos, or watermarks.

title: 电影般的魅力——疯狂动物城的梦幻景象
author: ShreyaYadav___

title: 雪地奢华情侣雪橇疾驰，尽享冬日浪漫与速度激情
author: Harboriis
prompt: 一位迷人的年轻女子，参考图片中她拥有光泽、飘逸的金色秀发和闪烁、愉悦的眼睛，身着华丽、洁白的皮草大衣，显得容光焕发、端庄优雅，尽显奢华。她坐在一位相貌英俊的年轻男子身后，参考图片中他五官分明、贵气十足，皮肤白皙，身穿一件优质哑光黑色羽绒服，搭配一条厚实的品牌羊绒围巾。这对情侣乘坐一辆光滑、抛光的木制雪橇，在白雪覆盖的山坡上疾驰而下，摄像机角度从上方略微倾斜，增强了速度感和刺激感。雪花在他们周围如喷泉般飞溅，在清澈的金色阳光下闪闪发光，化作耀眼的冰晶。构图以锐利、戏剧性的焦点捕捉了他们；他们的身影充满动感——她双臂张开，尽情欢呼，他自信的笑容和凌乱的头发呼应着这份刺激，奢华的靴子腾空而起。身后模糊的雪坡呈现出明亮的蓝色和银色，而温暖的阳光则突出了他们无瑕的肌肤和高级外套的质感。整个画面洋溢着肾上腺素飙升的刺激、专属的乐趣和强烈的吸引力——奢华、活力，以及俄罗斯冬季冒险最电影化、最精致的闪耀魔力，图片比例为 5:4。
prompt_en: A glamorous young woman a reference image, with glossy, flowing blonde hair and sparkling, joyful eyes, elegantly dressed in a sumptuous, pristine white fur coat-her appearance radiant, poised, and unmistakably luxurious. She sits just behind a strikingly handsome young man a reference image with defined, aristocratic features and fair skin, outfitted in a premium matte black down jacket, paired with a chunky designer cashmere scarf. The couple accelerate down a snowy hillside on a sleek, polished wooden sled, the camera angle dynamically tilted from above and slightly to the side, amplifying the sensation of speed and excitement. Snow churris up in glittering jets all around them, illuminated by crisp, golden sunlight and caught in dazzling, icy fragments. The composition captures them in sharp, theatrical focus; their figures are charged with motion-her arms lifted wide in exuberance, his confident smile and tousled hair echoing the thrill, luxurious boots airborne. The blurred snowy slope behind is rendered in luminous blues and silvers, while warm sunlight highlights their flawless skin and elite outerwear textures. The mood bursts with adrenaline, exclusive fun, and magnetic connection-luxury, vitality, and the sparkling magic of a Russian winter adventure at its most cinematic and refined and 5:4 image ratio.

title: 酒吧姐妹性感大片
author: @KeorUnreal

title: 时尚人像海报设计，融合文字与肖像的高级视觉表达
author: Heisenberg

title: 都市少女自拍镜像，慵懒街头风写真
author: Lex

title: 90年代男孩乐队粉丝自拍
author: Sienna

title: 高时尚牛仔品牌大片：银发女模侧卧伸展，展现柔韧与优雅
author: gauche

title: 高定礼服女性肖像摄影提示词
author: ShaHid WaNii

title: 高定礼服时尚大片
author: Sharon Riley
prompt:
{
“提示”：“一幅时尚、高级的肖像画，描绘了一个坐着的女人，低头看着她飘逸的礼服。这个女人有一头长长的、波浪形的深棕色头发，刘海垂在肩上。她穿着一件优雅的、拖地的礼服，有淡薄荷绿和鼠尾草绿的不同色调。紧身胸衣看起来是无袖的，或者是单肩的，有微妙的、有质感的或有图案的设计（可能是白色的花朵或抽象的印花）。裙子有一个很高的开叉，戏剧性地露出了她的腿。”。下裙的面料是透明飘逸的雪纺，优雅地披在她身上。她穿着高跟**系带凉鞋，带子一直延伸到大腿**，装饰着闪闪发光的装饰。一只手轻轻握住裙子的飘逸面料。她坐在一个长方形的小物体上，可能是一个红色或深橙色的脚凳或盒子，和绿色形成对比。背景是一张无缝的白色相纸或屏幕，部分可以在地板上看到。场景是在室内，工作室的灯光坚硬明亮，突显了裙子的质感和她皮肤上的光泽。这种情绪是复杂的、感性的、编辑性的。全身拍摄，高分辨率，杂志级质量。",
“风格”：[
“高级时装社论”，
“工作室肖像”，
“魅力摄影”
],
“主色”：[
“薄荷绿”，
“鼠尾草绿”，
“白色”，
“深棕色（头发）”，
“红色/橙色（座椅）”
],
“摄像头设置”：{
“视图”：“全身/四分之三投篮”，
“镜头”：“85mm定焦或类似（建议浅景深）”，
“照明”：“明亮、专业的工作室照明，强烈的高光/阴影对比”
},
“艺术家_灵感”：[
“Vogue杂志传播”，
“时尚活动图像”
]
}
prompt_en:
Google Gemini Nano Banana pro 3.0
{
"prompt": "A stylish, high-fashion portrait of a woman seated, looking down at her flowing gown. The woman has long, wavy, dark brown hair with bangs, cascading over her shoulders. She is wearing an elegant, floor-length gown in varying shades of light mint and sage green. The bodice appears to be sleeveless or one-shouldered with a subtle, textured or patterned design (possibly white floral or abstract print). The skirt features a very high slit, dramatically revealing her legs. The fabric of the lower skirt is sheer and flowing chiffon, draped gracefully around her. She is wearing high-heeled **strappy sandals with straps extending all the way up to her thighs**, adorned with sparkling embellishments. One hand is gently holding the flowing fabric of the skirt. She is sitting on a small, rectangular object, possibly a red or dark orange ottoman or box, contrasting with the green. The backdrop is a seamless white photography paper or screen, partially visible as a roll on the floor. The setting is indoors, with hard, bright studio lighting that highlights the texture of the dress and the sheen on her skin. The mood is sophisticated, sensual, and editorial. Full body shot, high-resolution, magazine quality.",
"style": [
"high fashion editorial",
"studio portrait",
"glamour photography"
],
"dominant_colors": [
"mint green",
"sage green",
"white",
"dark brown (hair)",
"red/orange (seat)"
],
"camera_settings": {
"view": "full body/three-quarter shot",
"lens": "85mm prime or similar (shallow depth of field suggested)",
"lighting": "bright, professional studio lighting, strong highlight/shadow contrast"
},
"artist_inspiration": [
"Vogue magazine spread",
"fashion campaign imagery"
]
}

title: 书掩面者静坐书斋沉思图

title: 后台自拍的K-pop偶像姐妹花

title: 2D矢量风格人物插画生成预设
author: Gagan Singh
prompt:
Create a full-body 2D vector-style character illustration with clean lines and smooth flat shading. Accurately study and replicate the original person’s facial structure, body proportions, skin tone, hairstyle, and expression from the uploaded reference image.
Match the exact {"outfit details" "outfit, colors, fabric feel, and accessories"}, keeping the same pose and posture.
Style should be {"style" "modern, minimal, and polished"} with crisp outlines.
Output as a high-quality transparent PNG, showing only the character with no background.
prompt_en:
Create a full-body 2D vector-style character illustration with clean lines and smooth flat shading. Accurately study and replicate the original person’s facial structure, body proportions, skin tone, hairstyle, and expression from the uploaded reference image.
Match the exact {"outfit details" "outfit, colors, fabric feel, and accessories"}, keeping the same pose and posture.
Style should be {"style" "modern, minimal, and polished"} with crisp outlines.
Output as a high-quality transparent PNG, showing only the character with no background.

title: 悬崖夕阳下的优雅美人
author: Dan Reed
prompt:
（4:5 纵横比）一张令人惊叹的高质量生活照，在黄金时段，于 {"location" "波西塔诺或阿马尔菲"} 的悬崖露台上用 iPhone 拍摄。

主体：一位美丽的年轻白人女性（20 岁出头），皮肤白皙如瓷。
*   发型：她拥有一头华丽的“浓郁栗棕色”秀发（暖棕色），造型为蓬松的波浪卷。逆光下的阳光在她头发上形成闪耀的铜色高光。
*   面部：她带着甜美迷人的微笑看向镜头。她的妆容清新透亮（桃色调）。

服装（光彩照人）：她穿着一件奢华的 **{"dress color" "香槟色或米色"} 缎面吊带裙**。面料流畅闪亮，映衬着夕阳温暖的橙色调。裙子有精致的细吊带和垂坠领口。她戴着一条细金项链。

姿势与动作：她舒适地坐在白色导演椅上，身体略微侧向一边。一只手放在桌上，拿着一副太阳镜，另一只手轻轻放在膝上或玩弄着项链。她看起来放松而优雅。

环境：背景是令人惊叹的地中海风光：郁郁葱葱的绿色悬崖、波光粼粼的蓝色大海以及黄色/橙色的建筑。天空是渐变的日落色彩。光线是“黄金时段逆光”，在她轮廓周围形成柔和的光晕，同时她的脸被环境天光均匀照亮。
prompt_en:
(Vertical 4:5 aspect ratio). A breathtaking, high-quality lifestyle photograph taken with an iPhone at a cliffside terrace in {"location" "Positano or Amalfi"} during golden hour.

Subject: A beautiful young Caucasian woman (early 20s) with fair, porcelain skin.
*   Hair: She has magnificent "Rich Chestnut Brown" hair (warm brown) styled in loose, voluminous waves. The backlit sun creates glowing copper highlights in her hair.
*   Face: She looks at the camera with a sweet, captivating smile. Her makeup is fresh and glowy (peach tones).

Outfit (The Glow Up): She wears a luxurious **{"dress color" "Champagne or Cream"} Satin Slip Dress**. The fabric is fluid and shiny, catching the warm orange hues of the sunset. It has delicate spaghetti straps and a cowl neck. She wears a thin gold necklace.

Pose & Action: She sits comfortably in the white director's chair, body angled slightly to the side. One hand rests on the table holding a pair of sunglasses, and the other hand rests gently on her lap or plays with her necklace. She looks relaxed and elegant.

Environment: The background is a stunning Mediterranean view: lush green cliffs, the sparkling blue sea, and yellow/orange buildings. The sky is a gradient of sunset colors. The lighting is "Golden Hour Backlight", creating a soft halo around her silhouette while her face is evenly illuminated by the ambient skylight.

title: 银发少女卧床光影写真，梦幻柔美氛围
author: Iris

title: 冷奢汉服高定特写
author: @VoxcatAI
prompt: 一张高端杂志级特写时尚肖像，主角为22岁现代汉服coser女性，散发冷静优雅、内敛力量气质；采用亲密近场视角（紧胸以上构图），她微微前倾，抬起一侧飘逸长袖轻触身旁的浅色木屏风，指尖掠过表面并轻压布料以呈现动感与重量，下巴微收而抬眼直视镜头，眼神克制坚定；机位略低，呈三分之四侧面视角，增强权威与景深。她身着奢华当代汉服重构：结构感立领外长袍配加宽袖，叠穿对襟短衣与高腰裙，饰以云鹤刺绣、金线织锦边、繁复提花纹理、半透明欧根纱层、丝绸光泽、天鹅绒丝带饰与细金属流苏，边缘光下闪耀（所有缝线、褶裥、滚边与织物纹理皆锐利且奢华）。发型为精致半披发，配华丽发簪与步摇珠串随动作轻晃。面部设计：鹅蛋脸软V下颌，微峰直眉，狐形杏仁眼正常眼距，佩戴自然透灰玉色美瞳带柔锁边环（无动漫夸张），鼻梁挺直鼻尖柔和，丝绒唇轻抿；神情平静内敛，眉间微紧。妆容为现代高定且极致精细（非传统舞台妆）：轻薄缎光底妆保留真实肌理与微遮瑕，柔和修容与上扬古铜，干净羽化眉，精准内眼线+细外眼线，中性冷灰褐眼影渐变，中心与眼头微闪，根根分明纤长睫毛，柔焦腮红沿上颧骨轻扫，高光仅点颧骨顶、鼻梁、丘比特弓与下唇，哑光玫瑰木缎唇。面部布光：45°前侧柔光箱主光雕刻颧骨与鼻梁，柔反光板补光保留远侧阴影细节，小网格轮廓背光勾勒下颌与发丝，双眼干净眼神光，高光控制避免额头过曝（T区哑光，高点微光），营造平静电影景深无硬阴影。环境为极简现代中式室内：浅色木屏风、淡墨墙纹与净石地面柔反光并虚化背景，使人物手势与空间实体互动。风格为奢华杂志摄影，克制低饱和色调，自然肌理，极致织物微细节；仅将我签名“VoxCat”作为世界观高定细节：腰带上悬一枚猫形玉牌刻“VoxCat”，袖口内缝一枚朱文小印章风格VoxCat刺绣（优雅无logo，时代一致），无其他文字；限制：无塑料肌、无重美颜滤镜、无夸张大眼、无高光3D、无杂乱背景、除含蓄VoxCat元素外无现代品牌、无水印；输出：高分辨率，面部极致锐利，近距景深强调，电影级清晰。
prompt_en: A high-end editorial close-up fashion portrait of a 22-year-old female modern-Hanfu coser with a cool, elegant “quiet power” presence, captured in an intimate near-field perspective (tight chest-up framing) as she subtly leans forward and lifts one flowing sleeve to brush against a pale wooden screen beside her, fingertips grazing the surface and slightly compressing the fabric to show motion and weight, chin gently lowered while her eyes lift to meet the camera in direct, controlled eye contact, shot from a mildly low-angle three-quarter view that enhances authority and depth, wearing an opulent contemporary hanfu reinterpretation: a structured stand-collar outer robe with widened sleeves layered over a duijin jacket and high-waist skirt, lavishly finished with cloud-and-crane embroidery, gold-thread brocade borders, intricate jacquard patterning, translucent organza veil layers, silk-satin luster, velvet ribbon accents, and fine metal tassel ornaments catching rim light (all seams, pleats, piping, and fabric weave rendered crisp and luxurious), styled with a refined half-up hairstyle and ornate hairpins and step-shake ornaments with dangling beads that sway slightly with movement; facial design features an oval face with a soft V jawline, straight brows with a slight peak, fox-almond eyes at normal eye distance enhanced by natural translucent jade-gray cosmetic contact lenses with a soft limbal ring (no anime exaggeration), a straight nose bridge with a gently defined tip, and velvet lips lightly pressed; expression remains calm and composed with faint brow tension; makeup is modern high-fashion and meticulously refined (not traditional stage makeup): lightweight satin-finish foundation with realistic skin texture and micro-concealing, soft sculpt contour and lifted bronzer placement, clean feathered brows, precise tightline + thin inner eyeliner, neutral-cool taupe eyeshadow gradient with subtle shimmer on the center lid and inner corner, separated wispy lashes, softly diffused blush lifted along the upper cheekbone, controlled highlighter only on cheekbone tops, nose bridge, cupid’s bow and lower lip, and a muted satin rosewood lip; face lighting is explicitly sculpted with a diffused softbox key light from 45° front-side to carve cheekbones and nose, a gentle bounce fill to keep shadow detail on the far cheek, a small grid/rim kicker to outline jawline and hair, and clean catchlights in both eyes, with highlight control that avoids blown forehead shine (matte T-zone, luminous high points), creating calm cinematic depth without harsh shadows; environment is a minimalist modern Chinese-inspired interior where pale wooden screens, soft ink-wash wall textures, and a clean stone floor softly reflect light and blur into the background, allowing the subject’s gesture to physically interact with the space; style is luxury magazine photography with restrained low-saturation color grading, natural skin texture, and extreme textile micro-detail; integrate my signature “VoxCat” only as an in-world couture detail: a small cat-shaped jade pendant engraved “VoxCat” hanging from the waist sash and a tiny red seal-style VoxCat embroidery stitched near the cuff (elegant, non-logo, period-consistent), with no other text; constraints: no plastic skin, no heavy beauty filters, no exaggerated big eyes, no glossy 3D, no busy background, no modern branding beyond the subtle VoxCat elements, no watermark; output: high-resolution, face tack-sharp, close-range depth emphasis, cinematic clarity.

title: 中国古代官服品级图谱
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt: 创建一个"中国古代官服品级制度可视化拆解"的历史图谱风格信息图,16:9横向构图。采用古代典章图式美学,使用古籍插图风格绘制。画面展示清代九品官员的官服差异对比,从左到右按品级排列:一品到九品共9个官员立绘人物。每个人物上方用工笔画标注"补子纹样"(一品仙鹤、二品锦鸡、三品孔雀...九品鹌鹑,文官用飞禽、武官用走兽),用放大镜特写补子刺绣细节。人物下方标注"朝珠材质"(一品东珠、二品珊瑚、三品蓝宝石...等级递减)、"顶戴花翎"(红宝石/珊瑚/蓝宝石/水晶等,用颜色色块区分)、"蟒袍图案"(九龙/五爪/四爪,用图示说明龙爪数量差异)。画面上方是"品级识别速查表":用表格对比9个品级在补子、顶戴、朝珠、蟒袍、腰带等5个维度的差异,每格用小图标+文字标注。画面下方是"历史冷知识":标注"为何文官用飞禽武官用走兽"(文职需高飞、武职需勇猛)、"花翎的政治含义"(赏戴花翎是皇帝恩宠)、"服色禁令"(平民不得穿黄色明黄)。底部用时间轴展示"历代官服演变":汉唐宋元明清的官服风格变化缩略图。所有文字用中文:顶部用小篆字体"官服品级图谱:穿在身上的权力密码",底部标注"服饰制度是封建等级的可视化呈现"。配色使用官服传统色。整体呈现历史制度和服饰文化,适合历史教育和文化研究。

title: 夕阳泳池边的性感写真女郎
author: Nano banana pro🍌
